description_long: This is a circular bracelet featuring a series of large, faceted, deep blue gemstones set in a metallic band. The gemstones are evenly spaced and held in place by prong-like metal settings, giving the bracelet a bold and luxurious appearance. A prominent butterfly-shaped metallic charm is attached to one side, adding a whimsical and decorative touch. The bracelet is displayed on a simple, white, U-shaped stand that supports its round form. The metal appears to be a polished silver or similar alloy, contrasting with the rich blue of the stones. The overall design is both elegant and playful, suitable for making a statement in urban fashion.
description: A circular bracelet with large blue gemstones set in a metallic band, featuring a butterfly-shaped charm and a polished, elegant finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the butterfly charm prominently attached to the bracelet and the alignment of blue gemstones.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular arrangement of blue gemstones and the open back of the bracelet.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the symmetry of the gemstone settings and the metallic band.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the butterfly charm from behind and the full circle of blue gemstones.
